meta.notes: v005-rev4: CONTINUE_APPROVAL family + REPORT_BACK vocabulary patch via EXTEND_EXISTING_FAMILY. Builds on v005-rev3 (frozen). Adds 1 new glyph for CONTINUE_APPROVAL (continue/keep going/i agree/etc) and patches missing present-tense variants of REPORT_BACK 'tell me what you ...' phrases without allocating new glyphs.
